name: SolHunt
description: Solana wallet health analysis platform and top-notch dev tool. Helps people and agents recover their SOL from burner and old wallets super securely. Features a complete trustless recovery flow natively via MCP: preview yields, build unsigned transactions, and sign locally.

tools.name: check_wallet_health
tools.description: Analyze a Solana wallet for recoverable SOL locked in zero-balance token accounts.

tools.name: get_recovery_opportunities
tools.description: Get a prioritized list of specific token accounts to close for maximum SOL recovery.

tools.name: preview_recovery
tools.description: Preview exactly what a wallet recovery will do before executing.

tools.name: build_recovery_transaction
tools.description: Build unsigned Solana transaction bytes for wallet recovery.

tools.name: discover_platform_features
tools.description: Discover additional SolHunt platform capabilities available on the web interface.
